title: Mede's Decor
description: Most decoration mods have way to many things, so i made my own
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33b42c8eb2327ebbd5efdce9d0878c9024e60bd.png)

Welcome to Mede's Decor!\
This was going to be a very small mod that adds a few things, but is now something bigger!
Instead of adding furniture, block verients or building tools, this decoration mod adds new shapes to already existing blocks!

### What does Mede's Decor add?
Along with shelves, walkways, beams, pillars and railings,\
It also adds a new brick-like material in the form of Metal,\
wich can turn into bricks, pillars, walkways and polished metal!


### Full list of features:
- Beams, a block thicker then a fence but smaller then a wall, rotatable like a log!
- Pillars, fancier beams
- Walkways, a rotatable block with half the thickness of a slab that can be placed\
   on both top and bottom halves of a block!
- Shelves, walkways but with a suportive beam on the bottom facing walls,\
   that cannot be placed on the lower half of a block
- Railings, one pixel wide fences that are placed on the sides of blocks, up to four in one block
- Metal, comes in bricks (slabs and stairs), walkways (with stair varient),\
  polished, large pillar, beam and regular pillar\
  Gotten via smelting iron scrap(4 iron nuggets) in a blast furnace
- Golden lanterns and chains, gold versions of lanterns and chains
- Lantern blocks, full block versions of lanterns
- Braziers, like a campfire met made of metal and wont cook your food/

Small fixes:
- Flowers and sweet berries can now be placed on decorated pots
## Warning: updating to 1.2 from previous versions might cause bugged blocks, you have been warned!

<details>
  <summary>Pre 1.2 info</summary>
Welcome to Mede's Decor!
this is a small mod with building blocks that dont add to much to the main game exept more building options for your house, base and dungeons alike!

### Currently Adds:
- Beams
- Pillars
- Metal blocks
- Metal walkways (+ walkway stairs and slabs)
- Metal chains
- Metal bricks (including stairs, slabs, walls and trapdoors)
- Metal fire bowl
- Metal and wooden Railings
- Golden lanterns and chains
- Glass and metal panels (like glass panes but on the side of a block)
- Full Lantern and Soul Lantern blocks
- Wooden Shelves
- Wooden walkways (go together with shelves realy nicely)
</details>

**CHECK GALLERY FOR MORE PICTURES**
